properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who is this Melchizedek, this King of Salem Who is this Melchizedek, this King of Jerusalem I am a gentile, I need to know for sure I am a Moabite, I've worshiped foreign gods Tell me more about this land, this different civilization, and this people who worship The Lamb

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Tell me of this city (tell me more. .) Tell me of this land (tell me more. .) Tell me of this people who worship The Lamb, tell me more…. Tell me of this earth (tell me more. .) and its generations For I'm a Moabite, sitting at the threshing floor

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yes, I have been quickened My course, He has changed And I'm no longer a stranger, but a citizen of Jerusalem Though I'm a gentile, I now have access to Him Yes I'm a gentile, and there's so much I need to know Tell me more about this God, about these dimensions and worlds For I'm a candidate of this supernatural world

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Tell me about my Jesus (tell me more. .) Tell me about God's grace (tell me more. .) Tell me of the predestination that brought me to this place tell me more…. Tell me of God's mercy (tell me more. .) that's changing and quickening me For I'm an heir of the promise given to Branham's seeds

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Who is this man Gabriel? The Angel of God Who is this man Gabriel? This messenger from New Jerusalem He is here, revealing the prophecies of God He has come, showing us our names in The Book Tell me more about this mysteries, this things that are to be For I know, they pertained unto me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Tell me about this Gabriel Tell me about His nature Tell me of how He shows me, my life in the scriptures Tell me about this Christ My God who is "enmorphe" He is the Lord of lords, who's now unveiled to you and me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You told me, I have three bodies But there's only, only one of me You told me, I am eternal And with You in eternity I'll be

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Tell me of this bread (tell me more. .) Tell me of this wine (tell me more. .) Tell me of this Body that's broken for me tell me more…. Tell me of this way (tell me more. .) of how to change dimension to my Theophany, that's the positive of me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Tell me of who I am (tell me more. .) this elected lady (tell me more. .) Tell me of standing and speaking in Your image again, tell me more…. Oh tell me of the adoption (tell me more. .) Oh and this glorified body For when Melchizedek appeared, He appeared in such a form
